summary: Stock-First Vendor Assignment Engine testing complete. All 22 backend tests passed (2 skipped due to no existing decisions in DB). Core features verified: candidates preview with tier classification, assignment decisions listing, explain endpoint 404 for nonexistent orders, supply record management, vendor eligibility checks, type-aware dispatch, and existing routes regression.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple supply records for testing: TEST_DOUBLE_BOOK_*, TEST_MTO_*, TEST_OD_*, TEST_ATOMIC_* products with various supply modes (in_stock, made_to_order, on_demand)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock-First Vendor Assignment Engine verified. Key findings: (1) GET /api/admin/assignment/candidates/{product_id}?quantity=N returns ranked vendors with tier classification (exact_stock=1, partial_stock=2, made_to_order=3, on_demand=4, product_owner=5), (2) GET /api/admin/assignment/explain/{order_id} returns 404 for nonexistent orders (correct behavior), (3) GET /api/admin/assignment/decisions returns empty list (no orders processed through assignment engine yet), (4) POST /api/admin/vendors/{vendor_id}/supply creates supply records correctly, (5) Tier classification works: qty >= requested = tier 1, qty < requested = tier 2, (6) Vendor eligibility shows eligible=true with reason='eligible', (7) Supply modes correctly classified: in_stock, made_to_order (tier 3), on_demand (tier 4), (8) Existing routes (health, auth, vendors list, vendor stats) all working. Note: Assignment decisions are created when approve_payment_proof is called in live_commerce_service.py - no decisions exist yet because no orders have been approved through this flow.

1_candidates_preview_endpoint.details: Returns ranked vendor candidates with tier, tier_label, supply_mode, available_qty, eligible, eligibility_reason, warning

2_tier_classification_exact_stock.details: Vendor with in_stock supply and qty >= requested gets tier 1 (exact_stock)

3_tier_classification_partial_stock.details: Vendor with in_stock supply and qty < requested gets tier 2 (partial_stock)

4_tier_classification_made_to_order.details: Vendor with made_to_order supply mode gets tier 3

5_tier_classification_on_demand.details: Vendor with on_demand supply mode gets tier 4

6_explain_endpoint_404.details: Returns 404 for orders without assignment decisions

7_decisions_list_endpoint.details: Returns list of assignment decisions, supports limit and engine filter

8_supply_record_creation.details: Creates supply records with id, vendor_id, product_id, quantity, supply_mode, lead_time_days

9_supply_record_listing.details: Lists all supply records for a vendor

10_vendor_eligibility_check.details: Candidates show eligible status with eligibility_reason and warning fields

11_type_aware_dispatch.details: Valid engine types: stock_first_product, promo_capability, service_capability_performance, manual_override, fallback_item_vendor, fallback_product_catalog

15_vendor_stats_regression.details: Returns vendor statistics with total count
